villains.name: Dillon Latham
villains.bio: Reigning Supreme Villain for 47 consecutive weeks. No challenger has survived the Latham Stare. The IVRA has classified him as a 'Civilization-Level Threat.'

villains.name: Trevor Larcom
villains.bio: Climbed three slots after the infamous Tuesday Incident. Insiders report Larcom has been training in the Sub-Tier Dungeon. Latham is reportedly watching closely.

villains.name: Androgenic
villains.bio: A newly detected anomaly in the Looksmaxxing multiverse. The IVRA is currently evaluating their threat potential.

villains.name: New Antagonist 4
villains.bio: A newly detected anomaly in the Looksmaxxing multiverse. The IVRA is currently evaluating their threat potential.

villains.name: Clavicular
villains.bio: A newly detected anomaly in the Looksmaxxing multiverse. The IVRA is currently evaluating their threat potential.

news.title: Larcom Ascends — Latham Watches in Silence
news.content: Trevor Larcom climbed two slots after the Tuesday Incident, claiming the #2 throne. Tribunal sources report Dillon Latham has not moved, blinked, or commented. The silence is, in itself, a threat.
